name: appril-sender
description: Sender + Webhook Lambdas del CRM de Appril (cola message_queue → SES / WhatsApp Cloud API).

scripts.package: cd dist && zip -q -r ../lambda.zip sender.js webhook.js && cd ..
scripts.deploy:sender: aws lambda update-function-code --function-name appril-crm-sender --zip-file fileb://lambda.zip --region us-east-1
scripts.deploy:webhook: aws lambda update-function-code --function-name appril-crm-webhook --zip-file fileb://lambda.zip --region us-east-1
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run package && npm run deploy:sender && npm run deploy:webhook
